info.name: MyGuard API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for MyGuard — Gated-community management platform

request.description: Register a new user. Creates Firestore user doc and sets role.
Get the current authenticated user's profile.
List all users with pagination and optional role filter. Admin only.
Get any user's profile by UID. Admin only.
Change a user's role. Admin only.
Activate or deactivate a user. Admin only.
Create a new society. Admin only.
Add a flat to a society. Admin only.
List residents in a flat. Admin and Guard only.
Pre-approve an expected visitor. Resident only.
Log a visitor entry. Guard only.
Approve a spot-entry visitor. Resident only.
Reject a spot-entry visitor. Resident only.
Verify a guest invite code. Guard only.
Log group visitor entry. Guard only.
